snapshot.scope: Manual WindowLayout review binds the UI, API, architecture, decision and traceability owners to the exact 3ddc4d0 candidate, its current Planning synchronization and bounded verification-owner classification.

reviewers.task: WindowLayout Main ownership, resident policy, base-size preservation, constrained fallback and H3 safety review
reviewers.independence: The reviewer did not author the WindowLayout code or Planning bind and compared the exact current documentation bytes, contracts, implementation, tests and trace projections before issuing CLEAR.

dimensions.summary: Existing UI, API, architecture and decision owners carry one WindowLayout contract without adding a competing owner or changing public release scope.
Owners and code agree on renderer intent only, Main-owned geometry and presentation, 720/840/960/1240 budgets, base restoration and Agent-first overlay fallback.
One exact WindowLayout IPC selector augments existing API, UI and exit evidence while every Requirement, Exit and Phase status remains unchanged.
The typed boundary is executable and testable; Main owns native layout, its 118-line policy is classified outside Pi, and renderer preserves H3 safety.
No new owner document was added; concise edits synchronize existing owners, one decision and one trace evidence projection on the exact governed snapshot.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:documentation-leanness
verification.evidence: Links, whitespace, document map, parser manifests, PRD contract, 93 decision records and all five leanness checks pass on the current Planning bind.
Boundary verification reports 112 current service files and classifies the 118-line Window layout policy as a non-Agent product boundary.
TRC-001 through TRC-004 pass before lock generation; the final run binds TRC-005 to this exact independent report and current evidence selector.

verification.command: Independent code, contract and supplied functional-evidence review of WindowLayout candidate 3ddc4d08e6b872516e419cf068168435ac532c03 against origin/main 26e18e15a8d083aaab2caea71b29fcb4b70d1013
verification.evidence: Review confirms Main ownership, intent-only renderer requests, resident-first budgets, exact base restoration, constrained Agent overlay, H3 retry/proposal safety and no status promotion.

coordination.compatibility: WindowLayout adds a versioned Main-owned geometry contract without changing durable vault data, H3 Job semantics, renderer proposal authority or release status.
coordination.acknowledgement: Product Planning synchronized the existing owners; verification now classifies native WindowLayout outside Pi, with all Requirement, Exit and Phase statuses unchanged.

nonBlockingRisks: Windows/Linux native-shell qualification remains deferred and unclaimed; the current real Electron geometry proof is macOS-only.
The legacy window.setSidebarOpen compatibility surface remains available, while the production renderer uses the versioned WindowLayout request/state/event path.
The candidate preserves H3 retry/proposal safety but does not close H3b/H3c, remaining Job-class recovery, atomicity, TOCTOU or signed-platform work.
Accessibility and final cross-platform visual equivalence remain governed open acceptance work; no Requirement, Exit or Phase status is promoted.
